name: Fair Lending Disparity Audit
outcome: Gated two-step chain for fair lending disparate impact audit. Step 1 computes the HMDA rate spread and classifies reportability. Step 2 computes disparate impact metrics from aggregate approval counts (4/5ths rule, z-statistic, standardised mean difference). Gate: adverse_impact_ratio < 0.8 exits to remediation path (4/5ths rule violation). All inputs are aggregate counts only. ZERO PII BY CONSTRUCTION.
